name: AD_Org show child organizations
code: AD_ISORGINCLUDED(ad_org.ad_org_id, CASE WHEN (@Parent_AD_Org@ IS NULL OR @Parent_AD_Org@ = '') THEN @AD_ORG_ID@ ELSE @Parent_AD_Org@ END, ad_org.ad_client_id)<>-1 AND IsReady='Y'

name: C_Tax_IsSOTrx_Date
code: C_TAX.VALIDFROM<=COALESCE(@DateInvoiced@,@DateOrdered@) AND (C_TAX.SOPOTYPE =(CASE WHEN @IsSOTrx@ = 'Y' THEN 'S' ELSE 'P' END) OR C_TAX.SOPOTYPE = 'B') AND C_TAX.AD_CLIENT_ID=@AD_CLIENT_ID@ AND C_TAX.C_TAX_ID=(CASE WHEN @IsSOTrx@ = 'Y' AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM AD_ORGINFO WHERE ISTAXUNDEDUCTABLE='Y' AND AD_ORG_ID=@AD_ORG_ID@) THEN (SELECT C_TAX_ID FROM AD_ORGINFO WHERE ISTAXUNDEDUCTABLE='Y' AND AD_ORG_ID=@AD_ORG_ID@) ELSE C_TAX.C_TAX_ID END)

name: Return reason RFC/RTV
code: (C_RETURN_REASON.ISRFC = @ISSOTRX@ OR C_RETURN_REASON.ISRTV=(case when @ISSOTRX@='N' then 'Y' else 'N' end))

name: UOM Validation
code: td0.c_uom_id IN(select p.c_uom_id from m_product p where p.m_product_id = @M_Product_ID@) or td0.c_uom_id IN(select a.c_uom_id from m_product_aum a where a.m_product_id = @M_Product_ID@ and ((@IsSOTrx@ = 'Y' and a.sales <> 'NA') OR (@IsSOTrx@ <> 'Y' and a.purchase <> 'NA')))

name: C_DocType PO/SO
code:
C_DocType.DocBaseType IN ('SOO', 'POO') AND C_DocType.IsSOTrx='@IsSOTrx@'
AND (AD_ISORGINCLUDED(@AD_Org_ID@,C_DocType.AD_Org_ID, @#AD_Client_ID@) <> '-1' OR COALESCE(@AD_Org_ID@,'-1')='-1')
AND COALESCE(@isReturnMaterial@, 'N') = C_DocType.IsReturn
AND ((@isQuotation@='Y' AND docsubtypeso like 'OB') OR ((@isQuotation@='N' OR @isQuotation@ is null) AND (docsubtypeso is null OR docsubtypeso not like 'OB')))

name: Invoice Rules for POS Sales orders
code: (AD_Ref_List.value IN ('I', 'D', 'O') OR (SELECT DOCSUBTYPESO FROM C_DOCTYPE WHERE C_DOCTYPE.C_DOCTYPE_ID = @C_DOCTYPETARGET_ID@) <> 'WR')

name: C_Project based on status and bpartner
code: C_Project.projectstatus in ('OP', 'OR') and (C_Project.c_bpartner_id=@C_BPartner_ID@ or '@IsSOTrx@'='N') or C_Project.c_project_id = @c_project_id@

name: FIN_PaymentMethodsWithAccountIsSOTrxControl
code:
EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM FIN_FinAcc_PaymentMethod fapm WHERE FIN_PaymentMethod.FIN_PaymentMethod_ID=fapm.FIN_PaymentMethod_ID
AND fapm.Payin_Allow = (SELECT CASE WHEN '@IsSOTrx@'='Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE fapm.Payin_Allow END FROM DUAL)
AND fapm.Payout_Allow = (SELECT CASE WHEN '@IsSOTrx@'='N' THEN 'Y' ELSE fapm.Payout_Allow END FROM DUAL))

name: Return reason RFC/RTV
code: (C_RETURN_REASON.ISRFC = @ISSOTRX@ OR C_RETURN_REASON.ISRTV=(case when @ISSOTRX@='N' then 'Y' else 'N' end))

name: AD_Org Security validation
code: (@AD_Client_ID@='0' AND AD_Org.AD_Org_ID='0') OR (@AD_Client_ID@!='0' AND ((AD_Org.AD_Client_ID IN (@#User_Client@) AND AD_Org.AD_Org_ID IN (@#User_Org@)) OR AD_Org.AD_Org_ID='0' AND AD_Org.IsSummary='N'))

name: AD_Org Security validation
code: (@AD_Client_ID@='0' AND AD_Org.AD_Org_ID='0') OR (@AD_Client_ID@!='0' AND ((AD_Org.AD_Client_ID IN (@#User_Client@) AND AD_Org.AD_Org_ID IN (@#User_Org@)) OR AD_Org.AD_Org_ID='0' AND AD_Org.IsSummary='N'))
